data.content: I can see the project. The express test expects `15.00m` but `CalculateShipping` returns `10.00m`, so that will fail. Let me start `dotnet watch test` for you:
data.reasoningText:
The user wants to use `dotnet watch test` for hot reload. Let me set this up. I can see that the express test will fail because the method returns 10.00m but the test expects 15.00m.

Let me start `dotnet watch test` in async mode so they can iterate.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-8ba754c8cea444dbb1f94f4c12f5a800 && dotnet watch test --no-hot-reload 2>&1", "description": "Start dotnet watch test", "mode": "async", "shellId": "watch"}
